mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.device_id) AS totalDeviceCount,
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.monitor_id IS NOT NULL THEN d.device_id END) AS collectedDeviceCount,
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.monitor_id IS NULL THEN d.device_id END) AS uncollectedDeviceCount,
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.monitor_id IS NOT NULL AND m.soc = 0 THEN d.device_id END) AS offlineDeviceCount,
IFNULL( SUM( CASE WHEN m.solar_generation_kwh BETWEEN 0 AND d.capacity_kw * 24 THEN m.solar_generation_kwh END ), 0 ) AS todayGenerationKwh,
IFNULL( AVG( CASE WHEN m.soc BETWEEN 0 AND 100 THEN m.soc END ), 0 ) AS averageSoc,
IFNULL( SUM( CASE WHEN m.saved_cost >= 0 AND m.solar_generation_kwh BETWEEN 0 AND d.capacity_kw * 24 AND m.saved_cost <= m.solar_generation_kwh * d.electricity_rate THEN m.saved_cost END ), 0 ) AS todaySavedCost
FROM ess_device d LEFT JOIN monitoring m ON d.device_id = m.device_id AND m.record_time >= STR_TO_DATE(#{selectedDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND m.record_time < DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(#{selectedDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND MINUTE(m.record_time) = 0
WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId}
AND d.group_id = #{groupId}
AND d.device_id = #{deviceId}
SELECT group_id, group_name FROM ess_device_group WHERE member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT d.group_id FROM ess_device d LEFT JOIN monitoring m ON d.device_id = m.device_id AND m.record_time >= STR_TO_DATE(#{selectedDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND m.record_time < DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(#{selectedDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND MINUTE(m.record_time) = 0 WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} GROUP BY d.group_id HAVING SUM(m.solar_generation_kwh) > 0 ) t

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT d.device_id FROM ess_device d LEFT JOIN monitoring m ON d.device_id = m.device_id AND m.record_time >= STR_TO_DATE(#{selectedDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND m.record_time < DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(#{selectedDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND MINUTE(m.record_time) = 0 WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} GROUP BY d.device_id HAVING SUM(m.solar_generation_kwh) > 0 ) t
